Alright, so this is the easiest way to do this. So when you're in your Transformation Challenge application, once it's completed, just go here, add notifications, okay? You can put your email in there and then, you know, we put our cell phone in so we know exactly when someone opts in. So you can send them, you know, a personal video text, just, you know, welcome them and they confirm in the appointment time that they're probably going to select. So just put your cell phone in here and then save it and then it'll automatically go to you. It's actually pretty easy. Super straightforward.
